commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: And said, This fellow said, I am able to destroy the temple of God, and to build it in three days. This man said: I am able to destroy the temple of God. These men that gave this evidence, are called false witnesses. They relate not the true words of Christ; which were not, I can destroy, but destroy you this temple 2. Christ spoke of the temple of his body, and they of the material temple. It is not unlikely that they made other additions, as well as false constructions, omitted by the evangelists.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: In three days, but He said not, I will destroy, but, Destroy, and not about that temple but about His own body.
